programme.title: The 10 O'Clock News

programme.title: Good Night New York
programme.desc: Christal Young and Ryan Kristafer's edgy perspective on entertainment and lifestyle news in NYC and beyond.

programme.title: Family Feud Favorites
programme.desc: "Family Feud" has seen some crazy moments over the years, so buckle up as we revisit these fan favorites.

programme.title: TMZ Live
programme.desc: A candid look at how the gossip site operates, bringing viewers into the site's newsroom, where the daily chats take place; viewers present their opinions on the featured topics through social media, phone calls and video chat.

programme.title: 25 Words or Less
programme.sub-title: Can They Keep It Smooth Under the Timer?
programme.desc: The energy is high, but precision matters -- do they stay steady or get thrown off by one wrong guess?

programme.desc: TMZ TV tracks down today's hottest stars with their cameras, whether they are hitting the clubs or the dry cleaners.

programme.title: Sherri
programme.desc: Sherri kicks off the show with laughs in the Stand-Up Spot; actor and singer Ne-Yo is here to talk about his star turn in Broadway's "Hell's Kitchen" and his country album; chef Jamie Oliver stops by to make some recipes from his cookbook "Eat Yourself Healthy: Food to Change Your Life.".

programme.title: The Jennifer Hudson Show
programme.desc: Jennifer welcomes back "Paradise" star Sterling K. Brown to talk about the newest season of his hit show; Grammy-winning artist Kehlani performs.

programme.title: Politics Unusual
programme.desc: Politics these days is anything but usual. Our political landscape is constantly changing and the potential impact is still unknown. FOX 5s political reporters break down the weeks biggest local and national political headlines.

programme.title: Live: United Football League
programme.desc: The DC Defenders visit the Birmingham Stallions for a Week 5 UFL matchup at Protective Stadium. Both teams have experienced a mix of dominant wins and surprising losses. The DC Defenders achieved a narrow 28-22 victory over the St. Louis BattleHawks.

programme.desc: A hidden wonder beneath the Appalachian Mountains; measuring air quality; rocks that make a ringing sound; mushroom farm.

programme.desc: A look at some unique jobs in the space industry, from becoming a famous space YouTuber to smelling items before they go to the International Space Station.

programme.title: Xploration Nature Knows Best
programme.desc: Scientists study animals' swarm behavior to make better robots, collect things on other planets and make better autonomous cars.

programme.desc: A dog named Leo needs a front leg brace to be able to walk; a champion show dog named Sergio needs a knee brace.

programme.title: Hope for Pain Sufferers
programme.desc: In this compelling investigation, John Walsh delves into OmegaXL and its natural origins; discover how this innovative supplement can provide relief from joint pain and improve your quality of life, all grounded in extensive research.

programme.title: Live: WNBA Basketball
programme.desc: From Barclays Center in Brooklyn, N.Y.

programme.title: Live: MLS Soccer
programme.desc: Western Conference rivals clash as Minnesota United FC hosts Los Angeles FC at Allianz Field. Los Angeles controls the rivalry 4-1 following a 1-0 win. Forward Kelvin Yeboah paces Minnesota against forward Denis Bouanga in this match.

programme.desc: From Dodger Stadium in Los Angeles.

programme.title: The 10 O'Clock News
programme.desc: Live and breaking news for New York City and the surrounding area.

programme.title: 99 to Beat
programme.desc: The remaining contestants compete in games Ping-Pong Obstacle Course, Snatch the Hat, Candle Extinguisher, Balance See Saw and Tower of Boxes.
